subject: Mozi Minute: Content Winner CTA Hack
body:
Words I like: The best way to make ads that work is to use ads that already work.

Mozi Minute: Content Winner CTA Hack

Most businesses waste money testing ads from scratch.

They create new content, new hooks, new everything.

Then wonder why most ads flop.

Here's the strategy that's generated half our winning ads (with almost no extra effort):

Step 1: Create lots of content (almost every business can benefit from more content)

Step 2: Find your organic winners - top 10% engagement

Step 3: Record a direct-to-camera CTA for your offer

Step 4: Add one bridge sentence and paste your CTA onto the winning content

That's it.

Examples:

Your gym post about "3 exercises that burn more calories than running" goes viral.

Add: "If you want to see if this applies to your fitness goals, download our free workout plan."

Your accounting tip about "write-offs most people miss" gets massive engagement.

Add: "If you want to see if this applies to your business, fill out our tax calculator and book a call."

Your marketing insight about "why Facebook ads fail" blows up.

Add: "If you want to see if this applies to your campaigns, grab our free audit checklist."

Why this crushes regular ads:

You already know it's a winner - the organic engagement proves it.

The platform rewards good content with cheaper distribution.

You build brand recognition while driving conversions.

Zero creative risk - you're using proven performers.

The customer experience is perfect.

People just consumed valuable content from you.

Your CTA feels like a natural extension, not an interruption.

Implementation:

1. Go through your last 50 posts.

2. Find the top 5 performers.

3. Record 30-second CTAs that match your main offer.

4. Test these as ads immediately.

This strategy works because you're not hoping content will work - you're amplifying content that already worked.

As promised, value in under a minute.

Amplify winners, don't guess,

Alex
